problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Tatva AI — AI-Powered Procurement Evidence Management System
summary: Design a technical platform that evaluates tenders, understands each bidder, evaluates eligibility, and produces explainable evaluation reports. The platform uses AI to extract eligibility criteria from tender documents, classify bidder documents, evaluate bidders criterion-by-criterion, detect cross-bidder collusion signals, manage tender versioning, and provide a fully traceable Officer Brief.
key_steps: Extract eligibility criteria from tender documents
Produce a fully traceable Officer Brief
